8.translation: respite would have been granted to them

30.translation: they will be made to stand

35.translation: so that you bring to them

52.translation: So were you to send them away

98.translation: so (there is) a place of dwelling

105.translation: and that We (may) make it clear

113.translation: and so that they may be pleased with it
and so that they may commit

121.translation: so that they dispute with you

137.translation: so that they may ruin them

165.translation: so that He may test you
